title: 2026 Grammy Awards Odds: Who Will Win Album of the Year, Best New Artist?
text: According to FanDuel Sportsbook as of January 20, the Best New Artist betting odds are: Olivia Dean -340 (bet 10 dollars to win 12.94 dollars), Leon Thomas +350 (bet 10 dollars to win 45 dollars), Lola Young +1900 (bet 10 dollars to win 200 dollars), Alex Warren +2200 (bet 10 dollars to win 230 dollars), Addison Rae +3300 (bet 10 dollars to win 340 dollars), The Marias +3300 (bet 10 dollars to win 340 dollars). Olivia Dean is the heavy favorite. The London native and West Ham Irons supporter has achieved significant streaming success with her neo-soul and pop artistry, positioning her as the frontrunner for the award at the 68th Annual Grammy Awards on February 1.
